span.p: Does the dashboard contain per-viewer/per-tenant DATA, or is it the same view for every authenticated user?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Is the dashboard a static asset on a host that can enforce auth itself? — Vercel/Cloudflare Access, Netlify

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: App-shell + embed-JWT — auth gate here, ROW SCOPE seams to data-platform RLS/embed-JWT

span.p: Static-host access control — platform auth (e.g. Cloudflare/Vercel Access) in front of the static dashboard

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Reverse-proxy gate — oauth2-proxy / Authentik outpost in front

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: SEAM: identity (auth.uid) handed to data-platform; it issues the short-lived embed-JWT with tenant scope and owns CSP/iframe-sandboxing
